'''''Valkyrie'' 14''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[1997]]. It contained many [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] articles, including one for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6 system]] entitled "[[Scorched Earth]]" which was written by [[Liz Holliday]].
